rulings.Case Title: RICHARD KIWATA VS. GREGG MATTHEW LYNN et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2006. PLAINTIFF RICHARD KIWATA'S Motion TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOTION "SHALL" BE MADE ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. SEE CRC 376 (a). =(302/req)

rulings.Case Title: CLEGHORN BAR ENTERPRISES et al VS. WILLIAM F GARLOCK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Order Determining Prevaling Party And Award Of Attorney Fees; Declarations Of Brian W. Newcomb'S Stephen S. Fry; George P. Eshoo; Natasha Moiseyev And Jonathan Cummings In Support
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2006. DEFENDANTS WILLIAM GARLOCK, THIRD & FOLSOM's Motion For Entry Of Order Determining Prevaling Party And Award Of Attorney Fees IS DENIED. 1.) UNTIMELY. AWARD ATTORNEY'S FFES COLLATERAL, THEREFORE NOT BARRED BY AUTOMATIC STAY. SEE BANKES ROBERTON NAZEMI. 2.) CONFUSION OF LAW NOT GOOD CAUSE FOR EXTENSION. 3.) EVEN IF TIMELY NOT ENTITLED RE ALLEGED IN CORPORATION. =( 302/REQ/KD)

rulings.Case Title: MARVIN C. WEINSTADT, D.M.D. VS. DENTSPLY INTERNATIONAL INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration; Memo Of P And A: Declaration Of Jennifer Hammond And Paul D Nelson; Request For Judicial Ntc; Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2006. PLAINTIFFS MARVIN WEINSTADT, RICHARD NATHAN, PATRICIA MURRAY, Motion For Reconsideration IS DENIED. 1.) FOUNDATION FOR TAXPAEYR AND ARON. NOT NEW LOSS NEITHER ADDRESS PFIZER ISSUE THAT EACH CLASS MEMBER MUST SHOW DAMAGED AS RESULTS OF FRAUDULENT BUSINESS PRACTICE. 2.) EVIDENCE NOT PER 1008 AND NYTIMES. STRIKE UNTIMELY "REPLY" EVIDENCE. =(302/REQ/PB)
